executionModelDetail: Direct in-session feature build (parent-expanded). SCOPE-01 implemented + unit-proven this session; SCOPE-02 is the live delivery proof gated on a new CI image build + home-lab redeploy.
inProgressReason: SCOPE-01 (Google Calendar write client + SST config + secret-key 3-mirror + scheduler wiring) is complete and unit-proven: 15 new gcal-client tests PASS, config fail-loud tests PASS, secret-key contract tests PASS (home-lab bundle emits the placeholder for the new CARD_REWARDS_GCAL_CREDENTIALS secret, no literal leak), format + lint clean. SCOPE-02 is the live home-lab delivery proof (Blocked): it requires pushing to smackerel main to trigger a new CI-signed image digest, delivering the Google credential via sops into the knb adapter, redeploying home-lab with calendar_sync=true, and proving a real card-rewards event lands on the operator's Google Calendar. The operator-supplied Google OAuth credential is staged + live-verified (refresh succeeds, calendar write scope, owner access to the target calendar).

scopeProgress.name: Google Calendar write client + config + wiring

executionHistory.note: Grounded the gap: the card-rewards CardCalendarBridge (spec 083) is fully built but its CalDAVClient is never constructed (wiring passes nil + warns 'production CalDAV client is not wired yet'). The only Google Calendar usage in the tree is the READ path (internal/connector/caldav GETs /events) — no event-WRITE client exists. Confirmed smackerel's tokenStore + OAuth handler exist but request calendar.readonly scope; the operator's recovered CCManager credential has full calendar write scope, live-verified (refresh OK, owner on the target calendar). Chose to build a focused write client in the cardrewards package + deliver the credential as the managed secret CARD_REWARDS_GCAL_CREDENTIALS.

Built internal/cardrewards/gcal_client.go (GoogleCalendarClient impl of CalDAVClient: deterministic sha1-hex event id for idempotent get-or-insert/update; refresh-token grant with in-process caching; value-safe logging; httptest-driven). Added CalendarID + GCalCredentials to internal/config/cardrewards.go (fail-loud when calendar_sync). Added CARD_REWARDS_GCAL_CREDENTIALS to all 3 secret-key mirrors (yaml + Go + shell) and CARD_REWARDS_CALENDAR_ID as non-secret config; updated the 2 pre-existing contract tests (TestSecretKeysMirror want-list + bundle_secret_contract A2 SHELL_SECRET_KEYS shape). Wired the real client+bridge into wiring_cardrewards_scheduler.go (graceful WARN+nil on malformed cred). Tests: 15 gcal-client unit tests PASS; config fail-loud PASS; secret-key contract PASS (home-lab bundle emits placeholder, no literal leak); format 65/65 clean; lint exit 0; config generate emits the new keys. SCOPE-02 live deploy proof is next (CI build + redeploy + real calendar event).

scopeProgress.name: Google Calendar write client + config + wiring
